officialEmailUse: Use only if the owner confirms the browser submission.
description: GCA, short for Go China Access, is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet. It is a concept-stage community direction focused on China-facing Web3 culture, creators, bilingual education, and public market narrative research. The contract created 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls. The token has starter Uniswap v3 GCA/WETH liquidity on Base Mainnet and a disclosed owner-held reserve wallet.

liquidity.liquidityDepthNote: Starter-depth only; trades can have high price impact and slippage.

supplyDisclosure.ownerReserveCustodyNote: Normal owner-controlled wallet; not locked, vested, or multisig-controlled.
